## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX with candidate Sheba Anyanwu.](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is a services agency using AI-driven workflows to generate content at scale for clients (5+ pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Role combines technical platform management and client-facing project management](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Sheba has extensive experience in content strategy, AI content generation, and technical communication](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Key success factors: ability to communicate technical issues, manage client expectations, and execute on strategy](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and Role Description

  - [Services agency with internal AI product launched in June](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Generates client content at scale (5+ pieces/week minimum)](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Role combines technical platform management and client-facing project management](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Pod structure: Account Director (strategy), Technical Managing Editor (execution), Content Manager (generation)](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Key responsibilities: communicate platform issues, manage deliverables, edit content, execute strategy](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Candidate Background and Experience

  - [Content strategist with technical communication and editorial expertise](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Worked with startups (Brand Yourself, Story Hunter, Stringer)](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [NYU Studio 20 grad program: intersection of editorial and human-computer interaction](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Project management experience at Wall Street Journal and Meta](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Recent role as content engineer at Launch AI for real estate clients](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Managed AI content generation, QA writers, and client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)

### AI Content Generation Insights

  - [Designed metrics for AI output and managed expectations](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Created prompt libraries and templatized systems](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Reduced content creation time from 3 days to 8 hours using AI](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Balanced client metrics with internal objectives (e.g., NPS scores)](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [Implemented JSON templates for structured data in GPT](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

### GrowthX Content Focus and Metrics

  - [Primary focus on editorial blog posts and SEO audits](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Growing interest in geo-optimization and AI answer optimization](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Thought leadership content in development](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Programmatic content generation for location-based services](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Current metrics: meeting contractual obligations and content performance](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Future focus on CSAT metrics and more sophisticated performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

### Success Factors for Technical Managing Editor

  - [Strong editorial skills](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Ability to communicate technical issues effectively](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Willingness to file detailed bug reports and suggest improvements](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Balance between hands-on work and leveraging the platform for scale](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

### Performance Evaluation

  - [Based on client satisfaction and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [Meeting contractual obligations](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Content performance (monitored by Account Director)](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Execution of strategy rather than nitpicking individual work](https://fathom.video/share/y7yYmw5H6LSW1BvFq5XLdq7hpHDkvBLP?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

## Next Steps

  - Move Sheba to panel interview stage
  - Sheba to prepare to discuss her process in more detail during panel interview
  - GrowthX to continue developing CSAT metrics and performance tracking
